title: Pride Flags (Ashley's Fork)
description: A port and contuniation of Maxb0tbeep's Pride Flags mod
body:
This mod is a fork/continuation of the [Pride Flag](https://modrinth.com/mod/pride-flags) mod by [Maxb0tbeep](https://modrinth.com/user/Maxb0tbeep), a mod which adds placeable pride flags to minecraft.

Flags in Original Mod:
- Progressive Pride
- Old pride
- Asexual
- Bisexual
- Gay
- Genderfluid
- Intersex
- Non-Binary
- Lesbian
- Pansexual
- Transgender

Planned versions:
- 1.16.5 maybe
- 1.17.1 maybe
- 1.18.2
- 1.19.2 ✅
- 1.20.1 ✅
- 1.20.4 maybe
- 1.21.1 ✅
- 1.21.4

Planned features:
- Intersex Inclusive Pride
- Transmasc
- Transfem
